source.title: Temu vs Shein vs Amazon: Delivery Time Comparison 2025-2026

extractions.claim: Delivery time comparison: Amazon 1-2 days (Prime), Shein 4.2 days avg (US warehouse), Temu 7.9 days avg
extractions.evidence: Amazon Prime: 1-2 day delivery, same-day available. Shein: apparel items from US warehouse arrived in 4.2 days on average; US warehousing handles 60%+ of American orders; 94% on-time rate. Temu: average delivery time was 7.9 days; only 38% of orders arrived within advertised 3-5 day window; 82% on-time rate.

verification.verifier_notes: From consumer testing data across multiple review sites

extractions.claim: Temu cross-border standard shipping: 6-20 business days; local warehouse orders: 3-12 days; target 1-3 days from DCs
extractions.evidence: Temu's standard shipping time is 6 to 20 business days for most international orders. Orders from regional warehouses arrive within 3-12 days. Temu aims to offer 1-3 day delivery from its distribution centers for nearby customers.

verification.verifier_notes: From dsers.com and dodropshipping.com shipping guides

extractions.claim: Temu European local warehouse delivery: 1-8 business days vs weeks for cross-border
extractions.evidence: Temu has now started using local warehouses in several European countries (including Germany, France, Spain, Netherlands, Italy, Austria), bringing delivery time down to just 1 to 8 business days.

extractions.claim: JD Logistics offers same-day and next-day delivery in China via self-operated network; Pinduoduo lags
extractions.evidence: JD's same-day and next-day delivery services are supported by self-built logistics network encompassing vast warehousing infrastructure and proprietary last-mile delivery. Pinduoduo's primary reason for entering instant retail is 'suboptimal logistics efficiency' — its performance still lags behind SF Express and JD Logistics.

verification.verifier_notes: From TechBuzz China and TYCORUN analysis
